subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Us unto him who turned towards Us when all the learned ones of the earth turned away from the Most Exalted Horizon, save whom God willed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لندا لمن اقبل اذ اعرض عن افق الاعلی علماء الارض کلها الا من شاء الله
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
